disclaimer: Competitor reports are pasted by a human, not produced by this tool. Reports are BLINDED (tool markers stripped) before judging. Scoring reuses calibrate.judge: the keyless deterministic RubricJudge (grounding-overlap + citation-presence proxy, NOT semantic entailment) unless run with --llm (host-model LLMJudge). cost_usd/latency_s are operator-supplied metadata and do not feed the categorical verdict. This is the measurement apparatus; the tally below is whatever the real runs produced, not a claimed result.
verdict: bad-research leads 1-0-0 (W-L-T) over 1 queries, scored by the keyless deterministic RubricJudge.

queries.query: Does regular aerobic exercise causally reduce the risk of clinical depression, or is the association confounded? Weigh the experimental against the observational evidence.
